reviews.review_description: So I’ve been playing This game for a good 3-4 years and I’ve always loved this game no matter what it’s a fun game where you can do a lot and I mean a lot!
would love to try this game love survival games but will not install please fix

developer_response.body: How come? Did you install it via applab or SideQuest?

reviews.review_description:
This game is not complete and still has a ways to go before a full release. It currently has some bugs and a pretty steep learning curve. Remember that this is a demo pre-release version. 

That said, this is well worth your time. Extremely fun and addicting to wander the island and try to survive. Very enjoyable game as is. There's a lot to do, and a lot more stuff coming in future updates.

This is a gem that has real potential - I'm excited to be on the early side of discovering this game. Just try it, it's free.

This game is an amazing adventure game! This game is a really optimized way to explore and create buildings and terrain on a virtual island in the middle of nowhere. I love how little resources this game uses on the Quest 2 and how much the DEMO version has to offer. I am really looking forward to when this game releases fully. I will totally download or purchase it. Keep up the development. I totally recommend this game to anyone who loves adventure and building games in VR...

Great game only issue I have is that the garden planter won't let me reuse it once the plant dies I can dig the dead plant up but I can't reuse the box also managed to get to all the islands without the raft or boat being unlocked but a lot items have no use but it does keep me looking forward to the next update or full release

**Added: I do have the hammer, but I die within 10 seconds of starting the game. I don’t have enough time to eat and gain energy before I die again.** I wish there was a way to move items after setting them. If you accidentally put a fence in the wrong place it’s there for good. I hope this is fixed at some point. Also, I can’t find enough plants to increase heath, they seem to be extremely limited. This makes the game frustrating to play.

developer_response.body: *** Added: May I know how you died? Attacked by snake? Falling from tree? Normally you should not be killed suddenly because of lacking food or water even they reached to 0. And try to find the 'rehmannia' flower and make soup to recover your health if needed....We may help you to enjoy the game!*** Have you tried hammer? We'll add more food sources but you can also grow apple/tomato as food supply tho.

reviews.review_description: Im taken back for words this game is super immersive keep up the great work

I really like this game and it’s really well made but the problem is I have stick drift on my controllers. I was able to turn off walking and just teleport but now I keep turning constantly, if possible can you make a setting so turning can be switch off?
Other than that this game is amazing
Surviving, crafting (((((BUILDING )))) Ok you got me Locked till the end. 👍🥰🥰
I'm playing the demo to decide if I want to buy the game. What's the difference between the paid version and the demo? The demos is quite long and not sure if it's worth buying. Thanks
I love this game/one because its survival/tow because you can bild
Not Shure if it is a demo or not

Full Review Video here : https://youtu.be/NyGgqLlxwCM

Big Fan Of Survival Games in General and not too many do it well in VR. I went into this game expecting a rough around the edges game. I was Dead Wrong....

Easily found myself sinking about 3 hours into this game, I just couldn't stop playing it.

The Demo is really ironed out and honestly this is a rock solid Survival game.

Performance is pretty decent even when recording native on the quest.

Graphics are just okay in my opinion, they of course work for a game like this but alot of these Indie games use very similar graphics and assets and when reviewing a TON of indie games like I do it can get a little stale.

For the Price of Free its kinda hard to not pickup and play this game.

Cant Wait to see more development on this game
Graphic are w
first thing i do is chop is chop down a tree and i have arachnaphobia and i screemed so hard after i saw the 2 foot tall spider

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear that but you can turn off the 'animals' in game settings.

reviews.review_title: Decent game, but lack of objectives.
reviews.review_description: I've been playing this on and off for like 2 days and I'm at day 9 in the game. I'm level 13 as well, but I'm just confused at this point? I've been able to figure out most of the mechanics and objectives, but I'm at that point where you don't do anything new. I just gather wood, meat, and coconuts, and basically nothing else other than expanding my house. Is there anything else to do? I see that you can unlock a raft and paddle, but can you even obtain that in the demo? Can you use it to discover new islands? Idk what I play the game for anymore if there isn't anything else to do or discover. So yeah, its entertaining for the moment, but it gets boring.

developer_response.body: Currently we are working on a pre-release version that you can explore the ocean and other islands with a raft/boat, more interesting things to do like climbing a cliff, fighting against gorilla with pistols, etc...I think the literal 'goal' in the game is to stay alive and live a little on islands until you find a way out. The demo version is just a way to show the POC and hopeful you will find more interesting things to do in upgraded versions later. It's a pleasure to know that it's entertaining for you. Please join our discord channel and let us know what you want to see/do in this game so that we can make it better!

reviews.review_description: This game is amazing. I totally recommend it

reviews.review_title: This is literally the best game ever!
reviews.review_description:
Edit: Even though this is just a demo I’m at that point where this game takes up 80% of my time inside VR￼.

           This is literally the best survival game ever. Green hell VR is overrated. Being stranded on a desert island is the best. Couple things you might need to know going in, there are crafting recipes that can cure your poison and sickness, And in the menu are the fences are there’s a sub-menu on the other side of the crafting menu book to craft walls and foundations for houses￼￼. I checked with the developer and the full game will cost some money, but it will be so worth it! The leveling system is great, you get experience for just about everything you do except for moving. XP for sleeping, eating, cutting coconuts, crafting, anything that is surviving!  When the full game comes out, I will totally be buying it. Literally this is the best survival game, no questions asked.
